## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webstacks and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, CMS updates, and performance metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/wjzED3fWyD57yrN5SdarXp-CuzpjKmSN?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New ProCon and multi-column table modules to be added to Sanity CMS for enhanced content creation](https://fathom.video/share/wjzED3fWyD57yrN5SdarXp-CuzpjKmSN?tab=summary&timestamp=714.0)
  - [Steady website traffic growth, with notable increase in LLM referral traffic](https://fathom.video/share/wjzED3fWyD57yrN5SdarXp-CuzpjKmSN?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)
  - [Upcoming improvements to performance reporting, including more custom dashboards and cohort analysis](https://fathom.video/share/wjzED3fWyD57yrN5SdarXp-CuzpjKmSN?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
  - [New lead generated from a March blog post on Webflow vs Builder.io](https://fathom.video/share/wjzED3fWyD57yrN5SdarXp-CuzpjKmSN?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)
  - [Focus on developing deeper, more prescriptive content on topics like LLM search, AEO, GEO, and attribution](https://fathom.video/share/wjzED3fWyD57yrN5SdarXp-CuzpjKmSN?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

## Topics

### CMS Updates and Content Creation Tools

  - [Jesse to add ProCon module to Sanity CMS by end of day](https://fathom.video/share/wjzED3fWyD57yrN5SdarXp-CuzpjKmSN?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
  - [Multi-column table component to be developed for product comparisons and improved content scannability](https://fathom.video/share/wjzED3fWyD57yrN5SdarXp-CuzpjKmSN?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [GrowthX team finding Sanity CMS straightforward and easy to use](https://fathom.video/share/wjzED3fWyD57yrN5SdarXp-CuzpjKmSN?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)

### Website Performance and Reporting

  - [Steady weekly traffic growth, despite typical summer slowdown](https://fathom.video/share/wjzED3fWyD57yrN5SdarXp-CuzpjKmSN?tab=summary&timestamp=878.0)
  - [Significant increase in LLM referral traffic, positioning Webstacks as "best in class"](https://fathom.video/share/wjzED3fWyD57yrN5SdarXp-CuzpjKmSN?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)
  - [Improved performance reporting in development, including:](https://fathom.video/share/wjzED3fWyD57yrN5SdarXp-CuzpjKmSN?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
      - [More custom dashboards](https://fathom.video/share/wjzED3fWyD57yrN5SdarXp-CuzpjKmSN?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
      - [Enhanced cohort analysis](https://fathom.video/share/wjzED3fWyD57yrN5SdarXp-CuzpjKmSN?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
      - [Custom pages for leads and conversion paths](https://fathom.video/share/wjzED3fWyD57yrN5SdarXp-CuzpjKmSN?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)

### Content Strategy and SME Integration

  - [New lead generated from March blog post on Webflow vs Builder.io](https://fathom.video/share/wjzED3fWyD57yrN5SdarXp-CuzpjKmSN?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)
  - [Focus on developing deeper content on topics like LLM search, AEO, GEO, and attribution](https://fathom.video/share/wjzED3fWyD57yrN5SdarXp-CuzpjKmSN?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Jesse conducting discovery interviews with clients to identify trending topics](https://fathom.video/share/wjzED3fWyD57yrN5SdarXp-CuzpjKmSN?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)
  - [Proposal to diversify content approach:](https://fathom.video/share/wjzED3fWyD57yrN5SdarXp-CuzpjKmSN?tab=summary&timestamp=1703.0)
      - [Include SME interviews and transcripts](https://fathom.video/share/wjzED3fWyD57yrN5SdarXp-CuzpjKmSN?tab=summary&timestamp=1759.0)
      - [Develop thought leadership posts](https://fathom.video/share/wjzED3fWyD57yrN5SdarXp-CuzpjKmSN?tab=summary&timestamp=1703.0)
      - [Create more in-depth tactical/strategic posts](https://fathom.video/share/wjzED3fWyD57yrN5SdarXp-CuzpjKmSN?tab=summary&timestamp=1718.0)
      - [Repurpose content for social media (e.g., LinkedIn)](https://fathom.video/share/wjzED3fWyD57yrN5SdarXp-CuzpjKmSN?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

### Community Building Initiative

  - [Jesse exploring the creation of a Webstacks-moderated community for clients](https://fathom.video/share/wjzED3fWyD57yrN5SdarXp-CuzpjKmSN?tab=summary&timestamp=1583.0)
  - [Aiming to connect VPs, directors, and CMOs facing similar challenges in B2B tech](https://fathom.video/share/wjzED3fWyD57yrN5SdarXp-CuzpjKmSN?tab=summary&timestamp=1583.0)
